## OVERVIEW

```

║                                                                              ║
║   RMBC METHOD — Stefan Georgi's Flagship Copywriting System                  ║
║                                                                              ║
║   The original course that codifies Stefan's $700M+ sales copy               ║
║   methodology into a repeatable 4-phase process: Research, Mechanism,        ║
║   Brief, Copy. Designed to turn copywriting from an art form into            ║
║   an engineering discipline with predictable, testable outputs.              ║
║                                                                              ║
```

## MODULE BREAKDOWN

### Core Modules (11)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  MODULE STRUCTURE — RMBC METHOD                                              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 1: RESEARCH                                                         │
│  ════════════════════                                                       │
│  Deep-dive research methodology. 5 complete real-world examples:            │
│  • Weight Loss niche research walkthrough                                   │
│  • Real Estate niche research walkthrough                                   │
│  • High-Ticket Coaching niche research walkthrough                          │
│  • Tax Savings niche research walkthrough                                   │
│  • (5th example included in files)                                          │
│                                                                             │
│  OUTPUT: Completed research document with avatar profile, pain points,      │
│  desires, market language, competitor analysis, proof elements               │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 2: MECHANISM                                                        │
│  ══════════════════                                                         │
│  How to identify and articulate the unique mechanism that makes the         │
│  product/solution work. The "why it works differently" story.               │
│                                                                             │
│  KEY CONCEPT: "Without a mechanism, you're just another marketer            │
│  making promises. With a mechanism, you're the ONLY solution."              │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 3: BRIEF                                                            │
│  ═══════════════                                                            │
│  Structured outline construction before writing a single word of copy.      │
│  Section-by-section blueprint with proof point allocation.                  │
│                                                                             │
│  KEY CONCEPT: "The brief is where the real thinking happens. Copy is        │
│  just execution."                                                           │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 4: COPY                                                             │
│  ══════════════                                                             │
│  Executing the brief into finished sales copy. Writing becomes              │
│  filling in a pre-structured template.                                      │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 5: FASCINATIONS                                                     │
│  ═════════════════════                                                      │
│  Fascination/bullet writing methodology. The art of creating curiosity      │
│  hooks that make readers desperate to buy.                                  │
│                                                                             │
│  KEY CONCEPT: "Great fascinations create an itch that can only be           │
│  scratched by purchasing."                                                  │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 6: LEADS                                                            │
│  ═══════════════                                                            │
│  10 lead structures for different market awareness levels:                  │
│                                                                             │
│   1. Story Lead                                                             │
│   2. Problem-Agitation Lead                                                 │
│   3. Curiosity Lead                                                         │
│   4. Contrarian Lead                                                        │
│   5. News Lead                                                              │
│   6. Proof Lead                                                             │
│   7. Secret Lead                                                            │
│   8. Prediction Lead                                                        │
│   9. Invitation Lead                                                        │
│  10. Direct Offer Lead                                                      │
│                                                                             │
│  Selection criteria: market awareness (Schwartz scale), traffic             │
│  temperature, product type, compliance requirements.                        │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 7: HEADLINES                                                        │
│  ═══════════════════                                                        │
│  Headline writing methodology. Systematic approach to crafting and          │
│  testing headlines that stop scrolling and command attention.                │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 8: SUBJECT LINES                                                    │
│  ═══════════════════════                                                    │
│  12 categories of email subject lines (expanded from the 8 in Subject      │
│  Line Matrix). Includes templates and fill-in-the-blank formulas.          │
│                                                                             │
│  Categories: Curiosity, Urgency, Benefit, Social Proof, Contrarian,        │
│  Story, News, Personal, Question, List, How-To, Warning                    │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 9: AOV MONEY CLOSE                                                  │
│  ═════════════════════════                                                  │
│  Framework for maximizing average order value through close                 │
│  architecture. Anchor → Stack → Contrast → Dissolve Risk →                 │
│  Urgency Layer → Downsell Bridge.                                           │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 10: PROOF STACKING                                                  │
│  ═════════════════════════                                                  │
│  Layering multiple proof types to make disbelief impossible:               │
│  testimonials, data points, credentials, demonstrations,                   │
│  third-party validation, before/after documentation.                       │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 11: TESTING PROTOCOL                                                │
│  ═══════════════════════════                                                │
│  Systematic split-testing methodology. What to test, in what order,        │
│  and how to interpret results for continuous optimization.                  │
│                                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Bonus Modules (6)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  BONUS MODULES                                                              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                             │
│  BONUS 1: Advertorial Writing                                               │
│  └── Native-looking editorial content for cold traffic conversion           │
│                                                                             │
│  BONUS 2: Email Sequence Architecture                                       │
│  └── Full sequence design: welcome, indoctrination, launch, evergreen       │
│                                                                             │
│  BONUS 3: VSL Script Structure                                              │
│  └── Video Sales Letter scripting methodology and pacing                    │
│                                                                             │
│  BONUS 4: Compliant Copy Patterns                                           │
│  └── Writing high-converting copy within Facebook/platform rules            │
│                                                                             │
│  BONUS 5: Freelance Copywriting Business                                    │
│  └── Pricing, client acquisition, portfolio building                        │
│                                                                             │
│  BONUS 6: Swipe File Dissection Methodology                                │
│  └── How to analyze winning copy and extract usable patterns                │
│                                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## KEY FRAMEWORKS EXTRACTED

### Tier 1: Core System

| Framework | Layer | ID Range | Description |
|-----------|-------|----------|-------------|
| RMBC Method | L4 | FW-SG-001–005 | 4-phase copy creation system (Research → Mechanism → Brief → Copy) |
| 10 Lead Structures | L4 | FW-SG-006–010 | Lead selection framework matched to awareness levels |
| AOV Money Close | L5 | MET-SG-001–003 | 6-step close architecture for maximizing order value |
| Subject Line Matrix (12 Categories) | L4 | FW-SG-011–015 | 12-category system with 60+ templates |

### Tier 2: Tactical Methods

| Framework | Layer | ID Range | Description |
|-----------|-------|----------|-------------|
| Fascination Writing | L5 | MET-SG-004–006 | Curiosity-hook bullet methodology |
| Proof Stack Architecture | L4 | FW-SG-016–018 | Multi-layer proof element stacking |
| Mechanism Identification | L5 | MET-SG-007–009 | Process for finding and articulating unique mechanism |
| Headline Testing Protocol | L5 | MET-SG-010–012 | Systematic A/B testing for headlines |
| Research Document Template | L5 | MET-SG-013–015 | Standardized research output methodology |

### Tier 3: Philosophies & Heuristics

| Element | Layer | Key Threshold |
|---------|-------|---------------|
| "Research is 80% of the work" | L1 | Research-to-writing ratio 3:1 minimum |
| "The mechanism is everything" | L1 | Every sales piece needs a unique mechanism |
| "The lead is 80% of the sale" | L1 | Lead length 500-800 words before mechanism reveal |
| 10+ headlines per piece | L3 | Minimum test set for headline optimization |
| 3+ proof elements per page | L3 | Testimonial + data point + credential minimum |
| VSL retention hook every 2-3 min | L3 | Engagement frequency for video sales letters |

## ELEMENT DISTRIBUTION

| Layer | Count | Key Elements |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| L1 — Philosophies | 5 | Copy-as-engineering, mechanism-first, research-dominance, lead-dominance, proof supremacy |
| L2 — Mental Models | 5 | RMBC thinking, research-depth-equals-quality, outline-before-draft, speed-through-structure, data-over-opinion |
| L3 — Heuristics | 8 | Research ratios, headline test count, lead length, subject line length, proof density, VSL pacing, upsell targets, mechanism timing |
| L4 — Frameworks | 7 | RMBC Method, 10 Lead Structures, Subject Line Matrix, AOV Money Close, Proof Stack Architecture, Sales Letter Outline, Headline Testing Protocol |
| L5 — Methodologies | 5 | Fascination Writing, Mechanism Identification, Research Document Template, Brief Construction, Swipe File Dissection |
| **TOTAL** | **~30** | |
